agent_info.transcription: For a first date, you want to strike a balance between looking stylish and feeling comfortable. Choose an outfit that reflects your personality and the occasion. Make sure it's something you can move and breathe comfortably in, because you'll want to focus on getting to know your date rather than on your outfit.
